commands.review_summary:
The PR changes MiniMax Token Plan parsing/fetching to prefer remains API quota lanes when HTML only exposes coarse prompt data, accepts alternate boost-field spelling, and adds focused MiniMax regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only falls back to remains after HTML parse failure and decodes only the older boost-key spelling. I did not run a live MiniMax probe because AGENTS.md requires explicit permission for live provider/account validation.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should decide whether the added credentialed remains request after parseable HTML is acceptable and whether the open weekly-quota issue needs more dashboard-aligned proof.
